race.comment: Former NSW galloper OAKFIELD GALAXY (4) has placed three of four since joining the new stable and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Will be rock-hard fit for this and maps ideally from gate three. Rates the testing material. ELEGANT FORCE (9) has been thereabouts at the past couple of outings and must be respected out of the Lees barn. Looms as the main danger. LITTLE LUNCH (7) strips fitter second-up from the spell and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Top-three aspirations. PROUD MISS (8) has hit the top-four in six of her past seven starts and is a must for the multiples. GYPSY WISH (11) next in line.
